top_profane.text:
As someone who has never knitted before in their life, I originally looked at this pin and thought, "What the hell is this world coming to." I mean, how much more crap can we haul in from Taiwan,anyway. There are landfills that should literally bear the label "Here We Have Crap From Taiwan", and again, "More Crap From Taiwan" and also, "Oh Look, It's Crap From Taiwan! Again." But then I thought of my Great Aunt Gertrude. She has been a knitter for a long time. One year, she knitted us boys matching sets of socks, mittens and underwear. Truly, she is our weirdest aunt.I'll never forget my father giving her a firm talking to on the front porch. He told her that no son of his would be wearing knitted panties, and she oughtta just stick to scarves and other outerwear. My brothers and I were peeking out the window,rootin' dad on. My aunt said nothing and handed dad his own pair of knitted man underpants.
For my high school graduation she didn't give money like my other relatives, but instead a pair of knitted boxers with John Lennon's face on them. In the you-know -what part. I will never forget the humiliation of opening that present at my grad party in front of all my football buddies.The day Lennon was killed is the only time I ever wore them. And I did so with great shame. I realized later (after using a urinal) that the only thing that could be worse than being killed was
top_profane.title: Confusing.

top_profane.text: Guinea pigs are little poop machines, they piss straight up calcification, it is freaking disgusting. I had to change out towels every freaking day, poop and pee everywhere, I was drowning in it. Since I bought the fleece cage liner these little crap factories actually use their litter box to pee almost every time. There is still shit for miles but it is pretty easy to pull this fluffy little bad boy out and shake the turds into the trash. I wash it about once a week and it cleans up nice, lays flat, and is soft on their delicate little tootsies.

top_profane.text: This is a 65 year old white guy in Texas. This is one of the finest handcrafted pieces of leather that I have ever had and it goes on a damn dog. I wish I could wear at myself. The quality is stellar and definitely a five-star. I saw that somebody reviewed it as it fell apart, BS. That person should not be allowed to leave a review because it just misleads people. This lady makes a fine product and I wish her the best. If anybody would bitch about this quality leather than they would bitch about anything. You all out there don't listen to anybody with any kind of negative issue because it just could not be true. Some people just can't be satisfied no matter what. You all step up and buy this lady's merchandise and tell anybody else the same. I love the product and definitely give it the highest rating possible because that's what it deserves. She even got the order on a Friday before Labor Day and got it to the shipper on that day. I received it the day after Labor Day because of her hard work ,honesty and integrity. I wish this person to best. It really does piss me off that anybody would have give any other than a five-star. Thank you very much for your help.
top_profane.title: Unbelievably good product

top_profane.text: It's no wonder there aren't any close-up images of these boards - complete crap!  There is probably $5 of material and labor in this entire thing . . . for a $150 price tag!?  Whoever is making and selling these has a pretty good scam going on - what a racket.  Even the graphics that were stuck on the plywood were extremely low quality.  And the "plywood" used has to be the cheapest stuff on the market, and it was barely sanded.  The clear coat sealer they used must have been watered down because it was crap too.  Save your money and don't buy this junk . . . it looks good in the one (1) tiny picture but I'm sure that's intentional - they don't want you to see close-ups of this thing!  And finally, they shipped it in some cardboard that must have been found in the dumpster out back because I looked like a 3-year old packaged it.  And the hanging brackets that were included were loose causing additional damage to these crap boards - total amateurs!
top_profane.title: Total Junk!  Don't waste your money!

top_profane.text: I used to melt shea butter on the stove, then removed it, pored it into a glass jar. Then I blended in any oil [vitamin E, coconut oil etc..] pouring it into it when the shea butter is warm and stirred it together then let it sit. This is the best combo for feet & peducures & dry hands. It starts out stiff, a little softer than Burt's bees cuticle cream but it's waaaaay better. This 1818 lamb is shea butter & coconut oil, and that's it. So they've created a terrific product that's safe to be absorbed into your bloodstream as ALL lotions do. Hats off to them for refusing to use cheap crappy products like Linolool which all L'oreal Revivlift products have in them. Those L'oreal Revivalift products are for face & neck and they have linolool in them which is the oil that drains from a dead lamb carcass that they hang from the ceiling and twist it's debonned carcass mechanically, the way you twist a rag, and the crappy oil that drains from it is what L'oreal and others are putting into their lotions & potions. No thank you L'oreal. Great job 1818 Lamb for creating a conscientious and health-conscience product that saves me the work and I'll love to buy.
top_profane.title: 4 Star Conscientious & Health-Conscience Lotion

top_profane.text:
I really like this bag. It’s beautiful and hip and I love how it will hold its structure and stand up (more like a breifcase) and not get all slouchy like a regular backpack. I didn’t notice a smell after the first couple days. Pockets and compartments are great. I wish the outer ones were slightly bigger to hold Mac power cord. It will fit but then getting it out is difficult. In the beginning 17” MacBook barely slid into one of the inside compartments but seems to be stretching out to fit nicely. Bag is well made and I am thinking I will be able to use it for years to come.

However, if you wear it as a backpack it’s pretty uncomfortable. I only walk a short distance in it but if you were in a city with a long commute it will dig into your back and that could get old. I only use as a backpack and not as messenger and it’s filled with super heavy crap so maybe that is contributing.

My other gripe is the buckles. I read the reviews about them but didn’t believe they could be that bad. They are. It’s extremely frustrating. You’ll just be walking and the buckle will just abruptly release and you have to grab the strap before your bag falls. I keep about 5k of computer crap in this thing so if it were to fall it would be traumatic. Sometimes I just get so annoyed I just carry it by the top handle (which is really sturdy) but defeats the point of this purchase.
top_profane.title: I have a Love Hate Relationship with this bag.

top_rant.text:
The two-sentence version of this review:
I bought this sleeve almost exactly 1 year ago for my 2017 15" MacBook Pro and it is still safely, beautifully, and perfectly protecting my laptop.

If you want thorough PROS, CONS, and OTHER THOUGHTS though, please read on.

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

So, I'm the kind of consumer who:
1) loves details (so be prepared for a long review)
2) reads as many reviews as possible prior to purchase (ex. 5-6 hours of reading up on phone cases for my iPhone 7 plus)
3) will spend more for quality on something I'm going to constantly use 9 out of 10 times because I value stewarding what I am given well
Be prepared for all this.

PREFACE:
So, flashback to Sep 17, 2017, I was using a cheap Tomtoc sleeve to handle my new laptop—a 2017 15" Touch Bar MacBook Pro—while I was looking for a better option.
Which, on that note, don't get one if you've got this same laptop. It's useless as it's far too roomy, allowing the laptop to haphazardly shift around all the time. (https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B01H4ZRJ9I/ref=oh_aui_search_detailpage?ie=UTF8&psc=1)

Anyways, I had spent 10+ hours reviewing mass-produced cases on Amazon, pricey handmade Etsy ones, etc. and was starting to give up on my search. In my frustration, I decided I was going to be cheap and settl
top_rant.title: 1-year later this is STILL 5 Stars

top_rant.text:
I was never someone who felt like stones were the way to go for me, but after the Pandemic I felt like I needed a cleanse of my inner life. I tried pills, thrills and cheap meals, but none of it worked. I bought these as a "why the hell not?" purchase and was not disappointed in the slightest! I found that after taking these stones I was able to change everything about my life! From the way I looked, talked and walked.
I want to go into a detailed review of each item purchased.
First was the Amethyst, since these were as small as they were, I chose to swallow this one whole. The star shape was rather intimidating, but by the time it made it past my throat, I developed a massive headache almost immediately. Trying Tylenol and other blood thinners, I found that the headache wouldn't go away, so I decided to try and sleep it off.
Once I was asleep I had this incredible dream about my father and I on a massive sea vessel. As the waves crashed against the ship I felt a throbbing on the top of my head. The more the waves crashed the sharper the pain. When I looked up, I saw my father floating above me with a hammer in one hand and an anvil in the other. Fire pouring from his mouth all over the top of my head. Once I noticed the fire was on me, it began to encompass my entire body, then began burning down the ship. The flames didn't scare me, but the waves of the ocean
top_rant.title: Great stones!

I can find them on Etsy easy or online etc but the ease n speed of Amazon just gets me every time lol I FINALLY finally found 5mm gold hoop nose ring and I was super excited. top_rant.text:
I have searched the entire internet for a year and a half for a refillable leather journal for my husband. He's not a big journaler but he likes to 'bullet journal' which basically means he makes to-do lists with bullet points, jots his notes and ideas and keeps track of his days that way. I can look at his list and be lost. (No doodles? No cute pen colors?!!) He looks at his lists and remembers the activities of the day fondly and feels productive. But here was my dilemma: my husband prefers graph paper / grid journals to write in but he can't find one he likes. He doesn't want to haul around the bigger gridded composition books because he is a minimalist. He doesn't like the dot grid journals because he wants the grid lines. He insists the smaller grid journals with colored covers I have found are too girlie. {Rips hair out}

I have poked around for OVER A YEAR trying to find the man an executive-looking leather journal that is refillable with grid paper but is slim and portable, not huge and bulky. It was impossible to find the journal fillers, let alone a leather cover, which would probably have to be custom made for about ninety if I ever could find grid journals he liked. I didn't mind investing in something that would last for a long time but such a thing just was not to be had. Until I found OleksynPrannyk.

You see, Moleskine just so happens to make
top_rant.title: Finally! Leather GRID Journals for Men! Moleskine Grid Journal Filler + This Leather Cover = INCREDIBLE! • Brown Thread Color •

top_rant.text:
This is a pearl necklace to where you get what you pay for. Pearls don't quite match, aren't quite round, and don't have much luster. The clasp is pot metal. That said, construction is OK. There's a knot between each pearl, so it's put together well. For the price, this is a situation where you get what you pay for. It's definitely for more of a casual or bohemian look, or good for small girls where you want to gift something real but not super high end.

Are the pearls real?: First off, Jacqueline Kennedy's iconic pearl necklace was fake. It was painted glass. When it went to auction in the 1990s it was appraised at four hundred dollars, just as jewelry and not with any Kennedy connection (of course it sold for more). That was a while ago, there's been inflation, and that's already more than ten times what this Crane Pearl necklace costs even before inflation. My point is that in this price range, fake and real overlap. For a necklace, unless you are spending four figures or up, fake pearls can be the better quality over real pearls. In this price range, what you see is what you get and looks is all that matters. There's a world of difference between low grade plastic pearls and high quality glass with several layer of paint to get a good luster. Now that that's out of the way, this necklace is real pearls. They aren't terrible, but they aren't great
top_rant.title: Irregular shaped pearls give a beachy bohemian vibe; well constructed with knots between pearls

top_rant.text:
So far with my kids, I have kept them out of air conditioned areas, and just had them wearing jersey knit 100% cotton face masks that aren't particularly tailored. With school being in person or bust this coming year, I am getting additional face masks so that I will always have enough as the kids loose them. This one seems good for young kids maybe toddler to early elementary. It seems to be all cotton as described, and the fabric seems good enough. It doesn't have nose wire, which is the only flaw (assuming you get the fit right for your child's age).

Size: I have 4 kids, ages 1, 3, 5, and 7. These masks are a perfect fit for the 3 year old, and also fit the 5 year old. The 5 year old seems to have a small face. These are a bit small for the 7 year old. He is almost 8. They work for him, but for that age I would go a little scootch bigger. For immediate use for a 7 year old, they are OK, but I'm kind of assuming things will last long enough for masks to be outgrown. The 1 year old pretty much takes anything off, including regular clothes, but these masks seem like they would be a good for for her.

Material and filtering: These are 3 layers of cotton - 2 of good quilting cotton and 1 of a more open weave. The outside pattern is two pieces of patterned quilting cotton put back to back and sewn together. Then inside there is a layer of white
top_rant.title: Good cotton and adjustable earloops make these an ok basic for toddler to early elementary

top_rant.text:
I wanted to leave a picture for everyone because they did such a great job with this, but I’m unable to because it’s a photo of someone who’s likeness I don’t have the permission to post here. Let me explain...

I’m not a violent person. But I’ve been harassed for 15 months by my landlord’s attorney (the man in the photo who’s identity I desperately want to post, here - AND who’s photo I actually have from his many, many unlawful trips to my house, BTW!) to the point where I found myself telling a friend, “I wish I could just punch this lawyer in the face!”

It was around that time I started referring to this “lawyer” as a clown and a joker. Later on, as I found myself thinking about hitting clowns (as one does), I remembered seeing those BOPPO-the-CLOWN inflatable toys as a kid (i.e. my mother’s “hilarious gag gift” to a 2 year-old, already TERRIFIED of clowns - thanks mom!)...and thought, to myself, “self...wouldn’t it be great to have that lawyer’s face on one of those BOPPO bags? I mean, he’s a clown and you won’t get in trouble for punching a toy in the face....plus, it could create a feeling of confidence for you, for when you have to see him face-to-face in court!” Of course, I also thought maybe I’d go right past “confidence and composed” into “uncontrollable laughter and shadow boxing” at the courthouse - but I was willing to take that chance. Ente
top_rant.title: Best Vinyl Project (product) EVER!

top_rant.text: I really like this. That should be enough to convince you. No? Well it does a great job of being orange, and counting seconds. One thing I actually really did like was the number of options. I didn't realize that it could be configured to such a degree. I mean, seriously, who would have thought it talks in Russian using Putin's voice!?? No one, because he doesn't do that. What it does do is keep time. I've got mine configured to display 24 hour time because I like to pretend in an Army POL specialist. I also have it periodically switch over to the date. Be careful though, I hadn't realized it was Indicating the date, trusted that it sad in fact 26 o'clock, and if not for my quick thinking and handsome chiseled features that chicks dig, I would have inadvertently had eggs for dinner!! I thought it was morning!!! The other feature I have configured is the hourly beep, which I imagine in my head is Putin saying things to me to elevate my self image. Lastly, and this wasn't intentional, but I think Putin voice likes it. During the day, everything displays a I've described in great detail above. However, everytime I wake up at my 2 1/2 hour intervals so I can go out to the kitchen and enjoy my bananas and bacon bits, the clock isn't displaying the time or the date. Instead, all the tubes, in an impressively precise synchronized manner, repeatedly count... Count... I don't know if th
top_rant.title: Great Clock With More Configuration Options Than I Realized

top_rant.text:
I now have this product in 3 colors, and I have 2 more bags of the Vanilla on the way. I have a small family run plant boutique where most of our products are shipped via USPS Priority mail, but I value the safety of the plants, the environment, and my clients, so instead of using stuffing that is not biodegradable, I have traditionally used the crinkle-cut kraft paper because it does an OK job of mimicking shredded newspaper but prettier. I am not selling cheap plants, nor am I selling mass quantities of plants forcing me to need the cheapest packaging supplies available, so I have the luxury to pass on a little luxury to my clients.

In the photo I have attached, you see a bag of the crinkle-cut craft paper on the left--a 1 lbs bag that is not compressed, so the volume does not increase much when you remove it from the plastic bag. On the right, you see THIS product, the shredded tissue paper, after it has been removed from the compressed paper packaging (think the size and thickness of a pair of ladies pantyhose or tights) then fluffed up to show the actual volume of the product when not compressed. It goes about as far as the crinkle-cut craft paper, and both will re-compress inside a package to be mailed, so honestly 1 package is not a lot of either product for my purpose--but for anyone using this for filling gift boxes, it's PERFECT (and I really love it for my
top_rant.title: So much nicer than crinkle-cut craft paper!

top_rant.text:
This press is incredible. It’s just wonderful. Success from the very first go.

I had initially purchased a Victoria cast iron press after having read reviews about how they were the “Rolls Royce” of presses. Then, before using it, and having had a chance to put it together and take a look at it, I read all the further reviews about how cast iron presses crack, the handles shear, etc; just from normal use. Also, folks complained that they just couldn’t get their tortillas, roti, etc thin enough and we’re still needing to roll them further with a pin to get them to the desired shape. Waaat? So I began to question the wisdom of my purchase. It became quickly apparent that I had made the wrong choice for us.

We decided that we would return the cast iron press; unused, and invest in the press we truly felt would deliver the results we were looking for, and have a tool that accomplished our goals from the outset.

My husband and I made this our Mother’s Day / Father’s Day gifts to each other for this year. (I’d get the press and he’d receive hand made tortilla, roti, flat breads etc. 😉)

I admit, this purchase was an investment for our budget, but I will say this press has been nothing but a joy. A joy to admire, and a joy to use, a joy to own. I made 6-8” corn tortillas on my first go, and cooked them on my little (10” Lodge) cast iron gridd
top_rant.title: Unbeatable press. ❤️

top_rant.text:
First of all, I want to start off by saying that the energy of this orgone is AMAZING! The moonstones are real! I really love moonstone and it’s energy, when I first received it and opened the box, I layed down and closed my eyes as I unboxed it, using sense of touch. I then placed the the pyramid over my third eye and just breath in it’s energy, for about 30 seconds. Then I held the pyramid in my left hand, I am right handed, but I did what felt right. I began to meditate with it, I wanted to feel it’s energy, for what it is, and not judge it based on how it looks, if it’s sloppy made or something is not straight or any of that, that doesn’t really matter if your buying this for a metaphysical purpose. Don’t forget why you’re buying it! Is it to look cool or pretty, or do you want to receive the benefits of a pyramid in your life ?
As, I began to meditate with it, I can feel a big vibration of energy! I felt as if my body was being filled with this energy and as it got down in my legs and to my toes it made my toes twitch, and move where I wasn’t doing that! I just remained calm and welcomed the energy. The experience was amazing! The energy was throbbing in my hand as I held it. When I was done with my meditation I thanked it and it made me smile I felt so happy, I gently opened my eyes and took a look at it. Right away I was able to tell the moonstone was real, I was su

top_rant.text:
I knit a lot, and I've bought dozens of decorative stitch marker sets over the last couple of decades. Good stitch markers can keep me plowing through challenging or frustrating projects because the joy of seeing them pass through my hands offsets or outweighs the irritation a pattern can cause. Bad stitch markers can send even stockinette TV knitting into hibernation. These are good stitch markers.

The main ring, the part the needles pass through and the yarn is most affected by, appears entirely seamless. These aren't a spiral wire cut into split rings but genuine metal rings.

The single negative I've found about them -- and it's specific to the Small size for size 7 needles and under -- is that for fingering/sock-weight yarn that's not being used in lace, the rings are thick enough I have to pull a little extra on each stitch after a marker to avoid loose-stitch ladders caused by the extra distance the yarn covers to span the thick rings. The effect is almost negligible, but it's more pronounced than (for example) the loose purl stitch caused by a yarn-forward (not yarn over) coming from knit to purl in ribbing. Where the stitch marker falls between knit and purl in ribbing, it amplifies that effect noticeably. These aren't appropriate markers for doing lots of sock-weight ribbing, so I'll have to use other markers for socks. That's a minor inconvenienc
top_rant.title: Lovely and perfectly functional

top_rant.text: I live in Maine and maybe our squirrels and birds are larger.  The feeder itself is awesome and the owner put his heart and soul into it, it is so obvious.  It is the Best Feeder Hands down.  The problem comes in with the holes on both sides.  The holes are not big enough.  I suppose it would be for the red smaller squirrels, but not the gray ones here in Maine.  All the animals share the feeders at my place, it is a matter of who gets their first and their size.  So the smaller ones feed later in the afternoon, after the larger ones have their fill in the morning and there is no stopping the Blue Jays from getting the peanuts.  They love them.  I have tried hiding the peanuts under seed and the Jays find them and take one, and two if they really try hard.  I love all the animals outside no matter, skunks can find their own food.  It wouldn't be so bad if they didn't get spooked and leave a stench.  Anyway this is about the Birds.  I noticed someone said that even the birds eat out of this feeder.  They sure do and one Freezing morning, I checked out the door and said Gee there is plenty of food.  It was dark in the feeder, I thought it was food.  That afternoon, I checked again and I saw something struggling in the jar.  I thought is that a squirrel?  I went to look closer and it was a Mourning Dove that had gone into feeder jar and then couldn't get back out.  Her body was to
top_rant.title: Birds can feed in it also, not so good

top_rant.text: I bought this sticker for my workout space.  I love it, but wanted to write so people would understand the size which is very unclear on the site.  This is the 35 X 50 size in DARK GRAY and is on an 8 foot wall.  It is much larger than I expected, but I have grown to love it.  I have reviewed the "Achieve" sticker from this company as well that I have on the opposite wall under another review.  As you can see, I didn't install it as it was laid out.  I liked the spacing that another customer did and I did something similar.  This sticker is Dark Gray and I love it on my green/gray walls.  I read tons of reviews about how to install it and I will say that you MUST put a single line of blue tape down the center of each section of the sticker at least 8 inches above the top of the sticker and 8 inches below the sticker so it holds it securely, then work only on all of the  letters from one side first.  KEEP THE CENTER LINE IN PLACE AFTER THE FIRST SIDE IS COMPLETE.  You must use a level.  For my wall as a reference, I made the "N" of NO my center of the wall and worked from there.  The sticker comes in several parts but I had to cut it to get this layout, just be sure you are cutting to allow enough room for the sticker under and above each message so it will adhere to the wall(In other words, don't cut it too close to the letter, leave an inch or so above and below).  It really t
top_rant.title: Highly Motivating - I LOVE it!

top_screaming.text:

top_exclaim.text:
My husband got me this after I sent him the link. Beyond talented!!!! Seriously!!! Look for yourself!!! Look what a quality job was done. So beautiful & surprisingly durable!!! I was a bit concerned after getting because I choose to get an anklet. I have had anchor anklets prior & all got caught on stuff. NOT THIS!!! I have worn for couple hours almost every day since getting & it still looks brand new. I do almost wish I got the bracelet ONLY so I could enjoy the amazing artwork myself more!!! This is great for yourself or as a gift!!!
UPDATE 14 AUG
Still love the art work Still feel she has amazing talent!!! BUT I think I jinxed myself almost wishing I had gotten a bracelet lol lol Do NOT get the anklet. As beautiful as it is - it is just too delicate for even normal wear. I gently moved my leg under a regular cloth blanket. Nothing where it could get caught WITH minimal pressure & it completely ruined the anklet. I am so sad!!! HOWEVER the art work & ice truly are beautiful!!! I feel it would still be prefect for a bracelet because you are just more aware of things on your wrist & your hands protect anything from hitting wrist. So still get but get the bracelet!!! Here is a pic of what it looks like now!!!
top_exclaim.title: EXCEEDED EXPECTATIONS!!!!

top_five_star_obscene.text:
I was honestly second guessing my order right after I purchased, JUST because there were no previous ratings for this seller and in the past I’ve also received some pretty crappy crystals from other sellers that had great reviews...

This is by far one of my best online crystal orders! Fast shipping and the item is actually a hell of a lot larger than how it appeared in the photographs. Great size and beautiful detail.

Thank you!! Very happy with my order.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Wow!

top_five_star_obscene.text: This product is handmade, in the USA, by skilled craftsmen.  It costs only 50% more than a throwaway piece of foreign crap.  It's worth 1000% more in the long run. I honestly don't think it would be possible to wear this thing out.  And I say this after wearing out dozens of other leather and textile multi-tool holders.  I wish I'd learned about American Benchcraft a long time ago.  I'd have not wasted many dollars on temporary solutions and would have put far less trash in our landfills.
top_five_star_obscene.title: The Most Rugged Multi-Tool Sheath Ever

top_five_star_obscene.text: I love this damn pint. Nothing more 'merican than an American flag and a GOTDAM bullet + beer!!!!! GIVE UM HELL BOYS!!!!!! Damn fine craftsmanship if I do say so myself. God bless America M***********!!!!
top_five_star_obscene.title: GIVE UM HELL BOYS!!!!!

top_five_star_obscene.text:
I purchased Gardenia because I really like that scent. It is a scent that does not create an allergy with me or bother my nose or throat. This is natural oils, and so far the fragrance is pungent enough for me. I have a small apartment 550sf so several sprays in each room is enough.

The real test on that though is to leave your home or apartment for several hours and see if you can still smell the fragrance when you return. I can. Also I can smell it lightly later in the evening after spraying in the morning. So that's very good in my book.

It has taken care of my musty air problem and it also has taken care of my trash/garbage odor problem in this small apartment so I don't have to take it out so often. Both cans have a lid, but at times I used to smell the trash - this fragrance has taken care of that problem.

I also use it in my linen closet and clothes closet which is very nice.

Also, the spray nozzle is very good. Does not build up in hole and does not drip or leak (so far) from the sprayer or the turn-cap, which is very important because you have to shake the contents before spraying. The spray is a short-burst spray about 10"-12" wide and about 6"-8" out/up and down. So it is adequate for me in my apartment. I have to do 2 or 3 sprays in each area. But that is fine for me. I purchased the 8 oz size and I believe it
top_five_star_obscene.title: Lovely Scent  - Great Product

top_five_star_obscene.text: [[VIDEOID:cf3b70ec51d90de041018523f1cd4618]] The Squirrel Feeder is very well made.  We glued/screwed a piece of wood to the brick wall and then a platform was glued/screwed to the piece of wood.  The Squirrel Feeder was then glued/screwed to the platform.  The platform gives the squirrel more room to stand and move around.  The feeder was filled with a variety of nuts (purchased from Amazon called Lyric 2647413 Fruit & Nut High Energy Wild Bird Food.  It has a variety of 12 nuts and seeds and the squirrels are crazy for it.  It took 2-3 days for the squirrels to discover it and now that has become our favorite pastime.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Great Squirrel Feeder

top_five_star_obscene.text: Definitely recommend I bought a cheaper one and it was crap paid a little more for this one and works perfectly. It's thicker and bigger then the cheap red ones. Definitely worth the money
top_five_star_obscene.title: Love

top_five_star_obscene.text: Bought these as a gift for Christmas, she loves all things purple. The flowers are beautiful and the earrings are dainty.  Perfectly sized.  Delivery took a bit but they are from China, don't let the source deceive you these are not crappy mass produced junk.  They are actually really nice earrings.

top_five_star_obscene.text: This is a nice little set of pumps/dispensers. I picked up a set of these after I was given a 12 pack of mason jars and was looking for something to do with them. They are obviously hand made, but they look nice on a regular mount pint jar with colored hand soap in them. Definitely and upgrade from using some crappy plastic soap dispenser. Would certainly buy again if needed.

top_five_star_obscene.text: Took a bit of time to arrive but oh so worth it! Ordered something I thought was similar for my daughter & hers was crap. These are the real thing - elegant looking. Would most definitely order again…in fact I am right now.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Amazing!

top_five_star_obscene.text: I recently turned 60 and am watching, horrified, as our precious planet slowly (and sometimes quickly) disintegrates.  There is no one generation to blame (I grew up washing aluminum foil and plastic bags, taking my lunch to school in a brown paper bag that had to be used until it fell apart, and not knowing what a disposable cup was until I saw friends’ moms buying them); all generations are in some part guilty.  But every generation, every single person, can begin to make a difference TODAY, and this wonderful bar is a great example of the way.  Not only is there no plastic involved, it WORKS!  This is the first conditioner bar I’ve tried (having used bar shampoo ever since my first trip to Europe in 2004) and it works so well I won’t try another.  I love it for my skin, too!!!  My legs are very soft and look healthy even three days after using this in the shower.  My hair stays cleaner longer, too, compared to crap in a plastic bottle.  Try this bar.  Oh, and it lasts a very long time; I’ve had mine for two months and it looks like the day I bought it, but I don’t shower every day.  Get the smaller size for travel.
top_five_star_obscene.title: Unbelievably good product at a great price.  Buy the smaller bar for travel (-1 ⭐️ explained).

top_five_star_obscene.text: As a huge horror/vintage fan I look for these kinds of these often and typically have to drop a decent chunk of change for crap quality. These are crisp, glossy prints that I have between Frankensteins Monster and Bride. It’s the perfect addition.
top_five_star_obscene.title: FINALLY!
